name: tn-medicaid-policy
note: TennCare is ~100% managed-care (1115 waiver) — no per-specialty FFS provider manual. Policy lives in: (1) the TennCare Policy Manual index (~47 short PDFs, /content/dam/tn/tenncare/documents2/*.pdf, curl 200); (2) TennCare Rules ch. 1200-13 on publications.tnsosfiles.com (S3, curl 403 — browser); (3) legacy TCMIS Medicare-crossover provider manuals (Ambulance/DME/Hospital/Physician) behind an ASP dropdown postback at tcmisweb.tenncare.tn.gov. Pharmacy PDL/criteria on OptumRx portal.

docs.title: Transportation Network Companies Providing NEMT Services (PRO 22-003)
Cost Calculations for Medical Necessity Determination of Private Duty Nursing Services (BEN 25-001)
Claims Processing, Timely Filing and Prior Authorizations (PAY 06-002)
When a Provider May Bill a TennCare Enrollee (PRO 08-001)
Coverage Review of Newly Released or Approved Pharmaceuticals (BEN 15-001)
TennCare Rules 1200-13-13 — TennCare Medicaid (covered services incl. Lab, Home Health, DME)
Contractor and Provider Screening of Employees and Contractors (PI 11-002)
Disclosure of Ownership or Control; Changes in Ownership (PI 10-001)

_comment: TennCare Policy Manual index has ~47 PDFs (PRO/BEN/PAY/PI/CON/ORG xx-xxx); captured 17 detector-relevant. tn.gov /content/dam/ PDFs curl 200. TennCare Rules ch.1200-13 on publications.tnsosfiles.com (AmazonS3) returned 403 via curl HEAD — may need browser or signed-URL pattern. TCMIS legacy manuals (4 only: Ambulance/DME/Hospital/Physician) are behind an ASP <select> postback at https://tcmisweb.tenncare.tn.gov/tcmis/public/manuals/ProviderManuals.asp — no static href, url left null. No standalone Laboratory or Home Health manual; coverage definitions live in Rules 1200-13-13.04. Pharmacy PDL: https://www.optumrx.com/oe_tenncare/landing (login).
